purpose: Preserve how project claims change epistemic state without overwriting earlier observations.

transition_rules.condition: A later authoritative source changes current interpretation while the earlier observation remains historically true at its cited source blob.
A primary repository source or retained runtime/deployment artifact directly supports the claim.
The proposal is implemented and retained with source-level evidence; implementation alone does not establish runtime or deployment truth.
The named falsification or review route is satisfied by retained evidence.
A contradiction appears and neither source has sufficient authority or recency to resolve it.

records.subject: M-001 queue status
records.reason: The earlier record correctly observed M-001 as active at an older ACTIVE_QUEUE blob; a later queue blob records completion. The historical observation is retained while its current-status interpretation is superseded.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Fetch CM-0003 and CM-0009 from the cited continuity-index blob and compare their source blobs and supersedes relationship.

records.subject: Canonical queue completeness assumption
records.reason: Recent owner-scoped queue deltas and commits postdate the canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE snapshot, so the snapshot is a baseline rather than proof of complete current state.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Produce a later explicit consolidation commit showing all cited deltas are incorporated into ACTIVE_QUEUE, or show the cited delta commit is invalid.

records.subject: Cloudflare deployment truth
records.reason: Deployment tooling, validation, and configuration artifacts exist, but no retained resolving hostname, served identity, and deployed commit proof has been observed.
records.falsification_or_review_route: Resolve only with immutable deployment evidence containing a resolving Cloudflare URL, matching served identity, and exact deployed commit.

privacy_boundary.included: Public repository paths, blob and commit identifiers, abstract operational claims, and explicit epistemic transitions.
privacy_boundary.excluded: Raw private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads.

unresolved: No automated validator yet enforces legal state transitions or source existence.
No atomic repository-wide consolidation protocol has been proven.
